# CommonMark Test Data

`commonmark-0.31.2.json` is pinned from:

```text
https://spec.commonmark.org/0.31.2/spec.json
```

The CommonMark spec site lists version `0.31.2` as the latest version. The
fixture is used as parser conformance test data and split-equivalence input; it
is not used to make HTML rendering part of the current product path.

The CommonMark spec site attributes the specification to John MacFarlane under
the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.
